title: Improved Fences
body:
----- ![improved-fences-banner](https://i.imgur.com/5BihiDW.png) ----- [More Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/improved-fences/gallery) ## Additional Links [Old Versions](https://github.com/NaiNonTH/History/tree/main/Improved%20Fences) | [Add-Ons](https://github.com/NaiNonTH/Improved-Fences/tree/main/Add-Ons)
## Description Improved Fences make Minecraft fences look even better, with connected models and **resource pack compatibility**, inspired by the Upgraded Fences model in MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod. This resource pack also has [add-ons](https://github.com/NaiNonTH/Improved-Fences/tree/main/Add-Ons) for you to try on! ## Mods Support * [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) * [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) * [Paradise Lost (The Aether Reborn)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paradise-lost) -----
[![support](https://i.imgur.com/ZiY2CXf.png)](https://ko-fi.com/nainonthen00b1)
## Terms of Use
[](https://nainonth.github.io/tou#classii) [Protected under a "NaiNonTheN00b1's ToU [Class II]"](https://nainonth.github.io/tou#classii)
